properties.name: default
properties.description: Configures the stream to use the instrument kind to select an aggregation and advisory parameters to influence aggregation configuration parameters. See https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification/blob/main/specification/metrics/sdk.md#default-aggregation for details. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: drop
properties.description: Configures the stream to ignore/drop all instrument measurements. See https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification/blob/main/specification/metrics/sdk.md#drop-aggregation for details. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: explicit_bucket_histogram
properties.description: Configures the stream to collect data for the histogram metric point using a set of explicit boundary values for histogram bucketing. See https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification/blob/main/specification/metrics/sdk.md#explicit-bucket-histogram-aggregation for details If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: base2_exponential_bucket_histogram
properties.description: Configures the stream to collect data for the exponential histogram metric point, which uses a base-2 exponential formula to determine bucket boundaries and an integer scale parameter to control resolution. See https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification/blob/main/specification/metrics/sdk.md#base2-exponential-bucket-histogram-aggregation for details. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: last_value
properties.description: Configures the stream to collect data using the last measurement. See https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification/blob/main/specification/metrics/sdk.md#last-value-aggregation for details. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: sum
properties.description: Configures the stream to collect the arithmetic sum of measurement values. See https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification/blob/main/specification/metrics/sdk.md#sum-aggregation for details. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: attribute_value_length_limit
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure max attribute value size. Value must be non-negative. If omitted or null, there is no limit.

properties.name: attribute_count_limit
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure max attribute count. Value must be non-negative. If omitted or null, 128 is used.

types.name: AttributeNameValue

properties.name: name
properties.description: The attribute name. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The attribute value. The type of value must match .type. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The attribute type. Values include: * bool: Boolean attribute value. * bool_array: Boolean array attribute value. * double: Double attribute value. * double_array: Double array attribute value. * int: Integer attribute value. * int_array: Integer array attribute value. * string: String attribute value. * string_array: String array attribute value. If omitted, string is used.

types.constraints: additionalProperties: false. Required properties: name, value.

properties.name: max_scale
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure the max scale factor. If omitted or null, 20 is used.

properties.name: max_size
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure the maximum number of buckets in each of the positive and negative ranges, not counting the special zero bucket. If omitted or null, 160 is used.

properties.name: record_min_max
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure whether or not to record min and max. If omitted or null, true is used.

properties.name: schedule_delay
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure delay interval (in milliseconds) between two consecutive exports. Value must be non-negative. If omitted or null, 1000 is used.

properties.name: export_timeout
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure maximum allowed time (in milliseconds) to export data. Value must be non-negative. A value of 0 indicates no limit (infinity). If omitted or null, 30000 is used.

properties.name: max_queue_size
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure maximum queue size. Value must be positive. If omitted or null, 2048 is used.

properties.name: max_export_batch_size
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure maximum batch size. Value must be positive. If omitted or null, 512 is used.

properties.name: exporter
properties.description: Configure exporter. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: schedule_delay
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure delay interval (in milliseconds) between two consecutive exports. Value must be non-negative. If omitted or null, 5000 is used.

properties.name: export_timeout
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure maximum allowed time (in milliseconds) to export data. Value must be non-negative. A value of 0 indicates no limit (infinity). If omitted or null, 30000 is used.

properties.name: max_queue_size
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure maximum queue size. Value must be positive. If omitted or null, 2048 is used.

properties.name: max_export_batch_size
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure maximum batch size. Value must be positive. If omitted or null, 512 is used.

properties.name: exporter
properties.description: Configure exporter. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: default
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure default cardinality limit for all instrument types. Instrument-specific cardinality limits take priority. If omitted or null, 2000 is used.

properties.name: counter
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure default cardinality limit for counter instruments. If omitted or null, the value from .default is used.

properties.name: gauge
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure default cardinality limit for gauge instruments. If omitted or null, the value from .default is used.

properties.name: histogram
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure default cardinality limit for histogram instruments. If omitted or null, the value from .default is used.

properties.name: observable_counter
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure default cardinality limit for observable_counter instruments. If omitted or null, the value from .default is used.

properties.name: observable_gauge
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure default cardinality limit for observable_gauge instruments. If omitted or null, the value from .default is used.

properties.name: observable_up_down_counter
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure default cardinality limit for observable_up_down_counter instruments. If omitted or null, the value from .default is used.

properties.name: up_down_counter
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure default cardinality limit for up_down_counter instruments. If omitted or null, the value from .default is used.

properties.name: temporality_preference
properties.description: Configure temporality preference. Values include: * cumulative: Use cumulative aggregation temporality for all instrument types. * delta: Use delta aggregation for all instrument types except up down counter and asynchronous up down counter. * low_memory: Use delta aggregation temporality for counter and histogram instrument types. Use cumulative aggregation temporality for all other instrument types. If omitted, cumulative is used.

properties.name: default_histogram_aggregation
properties.description: Configure default histogram aggregation. Values include: * base2_exponential_bucket_histogram: Use base2 exponential histogram as the default aggregation for histogram instruments. * explicit_bucket_histogram: Use explicit bucket histogram as the default aggregation for histogram instruments. If omitted, explicit_bucket_histogram is used.

properties.name: semconv
properties.description: Configure code semantic convention version and migration behavior. This property takes precedence over the .instrumentation/development.general.stability_opt_in_list setting. See code semantic conventions: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/registry/attributes/code/ If omitted, uses the general stability_opt_in_list setting, or instrumentations continue emitting their default semantic convention version if not set.

properties.name: root
properties.description: Sampler to use when there is no parent. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: ratio
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure ratio. If omitted or null, 1.0 is used.

properties.name: rules
properties.description: The rules for the sampler, matched in order. Each rule can have multiple match conditions. All conditions must match for the rule to match. If no conditions are specified, the rule matches all spans that reach it. If no rules match, the span is not sampled. If omitted, no span is sampled.

properties.name: attribute_values
properties.description: Values to match against a single attribute. Non-string attributes are matched using their string representation: for example, a value of "404" would match the http.response.status_code 404. For array attributes, if any item matches, it is considered a match. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: attribute_patterns
properties.description: Patterns to match against a single attribute. Non-string attributes are matched using their string representation: for example, a pattern of "4*" would match any http.response.status_code in 400-499. For array attributes, if any item matches, it is considered a match. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: span_kinds
properties.description: The span kinds to match. If the span's kind matches any of these, it matches. Values include: * client: client, a client span. * consumer: consumer, a consumer span. * internal: internal, an internal span. * producer: producer, a producer span. * server: server, a server span. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: parent
properties.description: The parent span types to match. Values include: * local: local, a local parent. * none: none, no parent, i.e., the trace root. * remote: remote, a remote parent. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: sampler
properties.description: The sampler to use for matching spans. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: key
properties.description: The attribute key to match against. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: included
properties.description: Configure list of value patterns to include. Values are evaluated to match as follows: * If the value exactly matches. * If the value matches the wildcard pattern, where '?' matches any single character and '*' matches any number of characters including none. If omitted, all values are included.

properties.name: excluded
properties.description: Configure list of value patterns to exclude. Applies after .included (i.e. excluded has higher priority than included). Values are evaluated to match as follows: * If the value exactly matches. * If the value matches the wildcard pattern, where '?' matches any single character and '*' matches any number of characters including none. If omitted, .included attributes are included.

types.name: ExperimentalComposableRuleBasedSamplerRuleAttributeValues

properties.name: key
properties.description: The attribute key to match against. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: values
properties.description: The attribute values to match against. If the attribute's value matches any of these, it matches. Property is required and must be non-null.

types.constraints: additionalProperties: false. Required properties: key, values.

properties.name: always_off
properties.description: Configure sampler to be always_off. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: always_on
properties.description: Configure sampler to be always_on. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: parent_threshold
properties.description: Configure sampler to be parent_threshold. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: probability
properties.description: Configure sampler to be probability. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: rule_based
properties.description: Configure sampler to be rule_based. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: semconv
properties.description: Configure database semantic convention version and migration behavior. This property takes precedence over the .instrumentation/development.general.stability_opt_in_list setting. See database migration: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/database/ If omitted, uses the general stability_opt_in_list setting, or instrumentations continue emitting their default semantic convention version if not set.

properties.name: semconv
properties.description: Configure GenAI semantic convention version and migration behavior. This property takes precedence over the .instrumentation/development.general.stability_opt_in_list setting. See GenAI semantic conventions: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/gen-ai/ If omitted, uses the general stability_opt_in_list setting, or instrumentations continue emitting their default semantic convention version if not set.

properties.name: http
properties.description: Configure instrumentations following the http semantic conventions. See http semantic conventions: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/http/ If omitted, defaults as described in ExperimentalHttpInstrumentation are used.

properties.name: code
properties.description: Configure instrumentations following the code semantic conventions. See code semantic conventions: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/registry/attributes/code/ If omitted, defaults as described in ExperimentalCodeInstrumentation are used.

properties.name: db
properties.description: Configure instrumentations following the database semantic conventions. See database semantic conventions: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/database/ If omitted, defaults as described in ExperimentalDbInstrumentation are used.

properties.name: gen_ai
properties.description: Configure instrumentations following the GenAI semantic conventions. See GenAI semantic conventions: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/gen-ai/ If omitted, defaults as described in ExperimentalGenAiInstrumentation are used.

properties.name: messaging
properties.description: Configure instrumentations following the messaging semantic conventions. See messaging semantic conventions: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/messaging/ If omitted, defaults as described in ExperimentalMessagingInstrumentation are used.

properties.name: rpc
properties.description: Configure instrumentations following the RPC semantic conventions. See RPC semantic conventions: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/rpc/ If omitted, defaults as described in ExperimentalRpcInstrumentation are used.

properties.name: sanitization
properties.description: Configure general sanitization options. If omitted, defaults as described in ExperimentalSanitization are used.

properties.name: stability_opt_in_list
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure semantic convention stability opt-in as a comma-separated list. This property follows the format and semantics of the OTEL_SEMCONV_STABILITY_OPT_IN environment variable. Controls the emission of stable vs. experimental semantic conventions for instrumentation. This setting is only intended for migrating from experimental to stable semantic conventions. Known values include: - http: Emit stable HTTP and networking conventions only - http/dup: Emit both old and stable HTTP and networking conventions (for phased migration) - database: Emit stable database conventions only - database/dup: Emit both old and stable database conventions (for phased migration) - rpc: Emit stable RPC conventions only - rpc/dup: Emit both experimental and stable RPC conventions (for phased migration) - messaging: Emit stable messaging conventions only - messaging/dup: Emit both old and stable messaging conventions (for phased migration) - code: Emit stable code conventions only - code/dup: Emit both old and stable code conventions (for phased migration) Multiple values can be specified as a comma-separated list (e.g., "http,database/dup"). Additional signal types may be supported in future versions. Domain-specific semconv properties (e.g., .instrumentation/development.general.db.semconv) take precedence over this general setting. See: - HTTP migration: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/non-normative/http-migration/ - Database migration: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/database/ - RPC: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/rpc/ - Messaging: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/messaging/messaging-spans/ If omitted or null, no opt-in is configured and instrumentations continue emitting their default semantic convention version.

properties.name: request_captured_headers
properties.description: Configure headers to capture for outbound http requests. If omitted, no outbound request headers are captured.

properties.name: response_captured_headers
properties.description: Configure headers to capture for inbound http responses. If omitted, no inbound response headers are captured.

properties.name: known_methods
properties.description: Override the default list of known HTTP methods. Known methods are case-sensitive. This is a full override of the default known methods, not a list of known methods in addition to the defaults. If omitted, HTTP methods GET, HEAD, POST, PUT, DELETE, CONNECT, OPTIONS, TRACE, PATCH are known.

properties.name: semconv
properties.description: Configure HTTP semantic convention version and migration behavior. This property takes precedence over the .instrumentation/development.general.stability_opt_in_list setting. See HTTP migration: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/non-normative/http-migration/ If omitted, uses the general stability_opt_in_list setting, or instrumentations continue emitting their default semantic convention version if not set.

properties.name: client
properties.description: Configure instrumentations following the http client semantic conventions. If omitted, defaults as described in ExperimentalHttpClientInstrumentation are used.

properties.name: server
properties.description: Configure instrumentations following the http server semantic conventions. If omitted, defaults as described in ExperimentalHttpServerInstrumentation are used.

properties.name: request_captured_headers
properties.description: Configure headers to capture for inbound http requests. If omitted, no request headers are captured.

properties.name: response_captured_headers
properties.description: Configure headers to capture for outbound http responses. If omitted, no response headers are captures.

properties.name: known_methods
properties.description: Override the default list of known HTTP methods. Known methods are case-sensitive. This is a full override of the default known methods, not a list of known methods in addition to the defaults. If omitted, HTTP methods GET, HEAD, POST, PUT, DELETE, CONNECT, OPTIONS, TRACE, PATCH are known.

properties.name: general
properties.description: Configure general SemConv options that may apply to multiple languages and instrumentations. Instrumenation may merge general config options with the language specific configuration at .instrumentation.<language>. If omitted, default values as described in ExperimentalGeneralInstrumentation are used.

properties.name: cpp
properties.description: Configure C++ language-specific instrumentation libraries. If omitted, instrumentation defaults are used.

properties.name: dotnet
properties.description: Configure .NET language-specific instrumentation libraries. Each entry's key identifies a particular instrumentation library. The corresponding value configures it. If omitted, instrumentation defaults are used.

properties.name: erlang
properties.description: Configure Erlang language-specific instrumentation libraries. Each entry's key identifies a particular instrumentation library. The corresponding value configures it. If omitted, instrumentation defaults are used.

properties.name: go
properties.description: Configure Go language-specific instrumentation libraries. Each entry's key identifies a particular instrumentation library. The corresponding value configures it. If omitted, instrumentation defaults are used.

properties.name: java
properties.description: Configure Java language-specific instrumentation libraries. Each entry's key identifies a particular instrumentation library. The corresponding value configures it. If omitted, instrumentation defaults are used.

properties.name: js
properties.description: Configure JavaScript language-specific instrumentation libraries. Each entry's key identifies a particular instrumentation library. The corresponding value configures it. If omitted, instrumentation defaults are used.

properties.name: php
properties.description: Configure PHP language-specific instrumentation libraries. Each entry's key identifies a particular instrumentation library. The corresponding value configures it. If omitted, instrumentation defaults are used.

properties.name: python
properties.description: Configure Python language-specific instrumentation libraries. Each entry's key identifies a particular instrumentation library. The corresponding value configures it. If omitted, instrumentation defaults are used.

properties.name: ruby
properties.description: Configure Ruby language-specific instrumentation libraries. Each entry's key identifies a particular instrumentation library. The corresponding value configures it. If omitted, instrumentation defaults are used.

properties.name: rust
properties.description: Configure Rust language-specific instrumentation libraries. Each entry's key identifies a particular instrumentation library. The corresponding value configures it. If omitted, instrumentation defaults are used.

properties.name: swift
properties.description: Configure Swift language-specific instrumentation libraries. Each entry's key identifies a particular instrumentation library. The corresponding value configures it. If omitted, instrumentation defaults are used.

types.name: ExperimentalJaegerRemoteSampler

properties.name: endpoint
properties.description: Configure the endpoint of the jaeger remote sampling service. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: interval
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure the polling interval (in milliseconds) to fetch from the remote sampling service. If omitted or null, 60000 is used.

properties.name: initial_sampler
properties.description: Configure the initial sampler used before first configuration is fetched. Property is required and must be non-null.

types.constraints: additionalProperties: false. Required properties: endpoint, initial_sampler.

properties.name: enabled
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure if the logger is enabled or not. If omitted or null, true is used.

properties.name: minimum_severity
properties.description: Configure severity filtering. Log records with an non-zero (i.e. unspecified) severity number which is less than minimum_severity are not processed. Values include: * debug: debug, severity number 5. * debug2: debug2, severity number 6. * debug3: debug3, severity number 7. * debug4: debug4, severity number 8. * error: error, severity number 17. * error2: error2, severity number 18. * error3: error3, severity number 19. * error4: error4, severity number 20. * fatal: fatal, severity number 21. * fatal2: fatal2, severity number 22. * fatal3: fatal3, severity number 23. * fatal4: fatal4, severity number 24. * info: info, severity number 9. * info2: info2, severity number 10. * info3: info3, severity number 11. * info4: info4, severity number 12. * trace: trace, severity number 1. * trace2: trace2, severity number 2. * trace3: trace3, severity number 3. * trace4: trace4, severity number 4. * warn: warn, severity number 13. * warn2: warn2, severity number 14. * warn3: warn3, severity number 15. * warn4: warn4, severity number 16. If omitted, severity filtering is not applied.

properties.name: trace_based
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure trace based filtering. If true, log records associated with unsampled trace contexts traces are not processed. If false, or if a log record is not associated with a trace context, trace based filtering is not applied. If omitted or null, trace based filtering is not applied.

properties.name: default_config
properties.description: Configure the default logger config used there is no matching entry in .logger_configurator/development.loggers. If omitted, unmatched .loggers use default values as described in ExperimentalLoggerConfig.

properties.name: loggers
properties.description: Configure loggers. If omitted, all loggers use .default_config.

types.name: ExperimentalLoggerMatcherAndConfig

properties.name: name
properties.description: Configure logger names to match, evaluated as follows: * If the logger name exactly matches. * If the logger name matches the wildcard pattern, where '?' matches any single character and '*' matches any number of characters including none. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: config
properties.description: The logger config. Property is required and must be non-null.

types.constraints: additionalProperties: false. Required properties: name, config.

properties.name: semconv
properties.description: Configure messaging semantic convention version and migration behavior. This property takes precedence over the .instrumentation/development.general.stability_opt_in_list setting. See messaging semantic conventions: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/messaging/ If omitted, uses the general stability_opt_in_list setting, or instrumentations continue emitting their default semantic convention version if not set.

properties.name: enabled
properties.description: Configure if the meter is enabled or not. If omitted, true is used.

properties.name: default_config
properties.description: Configure the default meter config used there is no matching entry in .meter_configurator/development.meters. If omitted, unmatched .meters use default values as described in ExperimentalMeterConfig.

properties.name: meters
properties.description: Configure meters. If omitted, all meters used .default_config.

types.name: ExperimentalMeterMatcherAndConfig

properties.name: name
properties.description: Configure meter names to match, evaluated as follows: * If the meter name exactly matches. * If the meter name matches the wildcard pattern, where '?' matches any single character and '*' matches any number of characters including none. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: config
properties.description: The meter config. Property is required and must be non-null.

types.constraints: additionalProperties: false. Required properties: name, config.

properties.name: output_stream
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure output stream. Values include stdout, or scheme+destination. For example: file:///path/to/file.jsonl. If omitted or null, stdout is used.

properties.name: output_stream
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure output stream. Values include stdout, or scheme+destination. For example: file:///path/to/file.jsonl. If omitted or null, stdout is used.

properties.name: temporality_preference
properties.description: Configure temporality preference. Values include: * cumulative: Use cumulative aggregation temporality for all instrument types. * delta: Use delta aggregation for all instrument types except up down counter and asynchronous up down counter. * low_memory: Use delta aggregation temporality for counter and histogram instrument types. Use cumulative aggregation temporality for all other instrument types. If omitted, cumulative is used.

properties.name: default_histogram_aggregation
properties.description: Configure default histogram aggregation. Values include: * base2_exponential_bucket_histogram: Use base2 exponential histogram as the default aggregation for histogram instruments. * explicit_bucket_histogram: Use explicit bucket histogram as the default aggregation for histogram instruments. If omitted, explicit_bucket_histogram is used.

properties.name: ratio
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure ratio. If omitted or null, 1.0 is used.

properties.name: host
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure host. If omitted or null, localhost is used.

properties.name: port
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure port. If omitted or null, 9464 is used.

properties.name: without_scope_info
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure Prometheus Exporter to produce metrics without scope labels. If omitted or null, false is used.

properties.name: without_target_info/development
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure Prometheus Exporter to produce metrics without a target info metric for the resource. If omitted or null, false is used.

properties.name: with_resource_constant_labels
properties.description: Configure Prometheus Exporter to add resource attributes as metrics attributes, where the resource attribute keys match the patterns. If omitted, no resource attributes are added.

properties.name: translation_strategy
properties.description: Configure how metric names are translated to Prometheus metric names. Values include: * no_translation/development: Special character escaping is disabled. Type and unit suffixes are disabled. Metric names are unaltered. * no_utf8_escaping_with_suffixes/development: Special character escaping is disabled. Type and unit suffixes are enabled. * underscore_escaping_with_suffixes: Special character escaping is enabled. Type and unit suffixes are enabled. * underscore_escaping_without_suffixes/development: Special character escaping is enabled. Type and unit suffixes are disabled. This represents classic Prometheus metric name compatibility. If omitted, underscore_escaping_with_suffixes is used.

properties.name: attributes
properties.description: Configure attributes provided by resource detectors. If omitted, all attributes from resource detectors are added.

properties.name: detectors
properties.description: Configure resource detectors. Resource detector names are dependent on the SDK language ecosystem. Please consult documentation for each respective language. If omitted, no resource detectors are enabled.

properties.name: container
properties.description: Enable the container resource detector, which populates container.* attributes. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: host
properties.description: Enable the host resource detector, which populates host.* and os.* attributes. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: process
properties.description: Enable the process resource detector, which populates process.* attributes. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: service
properties.description: Enable the service detector, which populates service.name based on the OTEL_SERVICE_NAME environment variable and service.instance.id. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: semconv
properties.description: Configure RPC semantic convention version and migration behavior. This property takes precedence over the .instrumentation/development.general.stability_opt_in_list setting. See RPC semantic conventions: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/rpc/ If omitted, uses the general stability_opt_in_list setting, or instrumentations continue emitting their default semantic convention version if not set.

properties.name: url
properties.description: Configure URL sanitization options. If omitted, defaults as described in ExperimentalUrlSanitization are used.

properties.name: version
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: The target semantic convention version for this domain (e.g., 1). If omitted or null, the latest stable version is used, or if no stable version is available and .experimental is true then the latest experimental version is used.

properties.name: experimental
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Use latest experimental semantic conventions (before stable is available or to enable experimental features on top of stable conventions). If omitted or null, false is used.

properties.name: dual_emit
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: When true, also emit the previous major version alongside the target version. For version=1, the previous version refers to the pre-stable conventions that the instrumentation emitted before the first stable semantic convention version was defined. For version=2 and above, the previous version is the prior stable major version (e.g., version=2, dual_emit=true emits both v2 and v1). Enables dual-emit for phased migration between versions. If omitted or null, false is used.

properties.name: enabled
properties.description: Configure if the tracer is enabled or not. If omitted, true is used.

properties.name: default_config
properties.description: Configure the default tracer config used there is no matching entry in .tracer_configurator/development.tracers. If omitted, unmatched .tracers use default values as described in ExperimentalTracerConfig.

properties.name: tracers
properties.description: Configure tracers. If omitted, all tracers use .default_config.

types.name: ExperimentalTracerMatcherAndConfig

properties.name: name
properties.description: Configure tracer names to match, evaluated as follows: * If the tracer name exactly matches. * If the tracer name matches the wildcard pattern, where '?' matches any single character and '*' matches any number of characters including none. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: config
properties.description: The tracer config. Property is required and must be non-null.

types.constraints: additionalProperties: false. Required properties: name, config.

properties.name: sensitive_query_parameters
properties.description: List of query parameter names whose values should be redacted from URLs. Query parameter names are case-sensitive. This is a full override of the default sensitive query parameter keys, it is not a list of keys in addition to the defaults. Set to an empty array to disable query parameter redaction. If omitted, the default sensitive query parameter list as defined by the url semantic conventions (https://github.com/open-telemetry/semantic-conventions/blob/main/docs/registry/attributes/url.md) is used.

properties.name: record_min_max
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure record min and max. If omitted or null, true is used.

properties.name: ca_file
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure certificate used to verify a server's TLS credentials. Absolute path to certificate file in PEM format. If omitted or null, system default certificate verification is used for secure connections.

properties.name: key_file
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure mTLS private client key. Absolute path to client key file in PEM format. If set, .client_certificate must also be set. If omitted or null, mTLS is not used.

properties.name: cert_file
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure mTLS client certificate. Absolute path to client certificate file in PEM format. If set, .client_key must also be set. If omitted or null, mTLS is not used.

properties.name: insecure
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure client transport security for the exporter's connection. Only applicable when .endpoint is provided without http or https scheme. Implementations may choose to ignore .insecure. If omitted or null, false is used.

properties.name: ca_file
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure certificate used to verify a server's TLS credentials. Absolute path to certificate file in PEM format. If omitted or null, system default certificate verification is used for secure connections.

properties.name: key_file
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure mTLS private client key. Absolute path to client key file in PEM format. If set, .client_certificate must also be set. If omitted or null, mTLS is not used.

properties.name: cert_file
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure mTLS client certificate. Absolute path to client certificate file in PEM format. If set, .client_key must also be set. If omitted or null, mTLS is not used.

properties.name: included
properties.description: Configure list of value patterns to include. Values are evaluated to match as follows: * If the value exactly matches. * If the value matches the wildcard pattern, where '?' matches any single character and '*' matches any number of characters including none. If omitted, all values are included.

properties.name: excluded
properties.description: Configure list of value patterns to exclude. Applies after .included (i.e. excluded has higher priority than included). Values are evaluated to match as follows: * If the value exactly matches. * If the value matches the wildcard pattern, where '?' matches any single character and '*' matches any number of characters including none. If omitted, .included attributes are included.

properties.name: processors
properties.description: Configure log record processors. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: limits
properties.description: Configure log record limits. See also attribute_limits. If omitted, default values as described in LogRecordLimits are used.

properties.name: logger_configurator/development
properties.description: Configure loggers. If omitted, all loggers use default values as described in ExperimentalLoggerConfig.

properties.name: otlp_http
properties.description: Configure exporter to be OTLP with HTTP transport. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: otlp_grpc
properties.description: Configure exporter to be OTLP with gRPC transport. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: otlp_file/development
properties.description: Configure exporter to be OTLP with file transport. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: console
properties.description: Configure exporter to be console. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: attribute_value_length_limit
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure max attribute value size. Overrides .attribute_limits.attribute_value_length_limit. Value must be non-negative. If omitted or null, there is no limit.

properties.name: attribute_count_limit
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure max attribute count. Overrides .attribute_limits.attribute_count_limit. Value must be non-negative. If omitted or null, 128 is used.

properties.name: batch
properties.description: Configure a batch log record processor. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: simple
properties.description: Configure a simple log record processor. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: readers
properties.description: Configure metric readers. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: views
properties.description: Configure views. Each view has a selector which determines the instrument(s) it applies to, and a configuration for the resulting stream(s). If omitted, no views are registered.

properties.name: exemplar_filter
properties.description: Configure the exemplar filter. Values include: * always_off: ExemplarFilter which makes no measurements eligible for being an Exemplar. * always_on: ExemplarFilter which makes all measurements eligible for being an Exemplar. * trace_based: ExemplarFilter which makes measurements recorded in the context of a sampled parent span eligible for being an Exemplar. If omitted, trace_based is used.

properties.name: meter_configurator/development
properties.description: Configure meters. If omitted, all meters use default values as described in ExperimentalMeterConfig.

properties.name: opencensus
properties.description: Configure metric producer to be opencensus. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: periodic
properties.description: Configure a periodic metric reader. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: pull
properties.description: Configure a pull based metric reader. If omitted, ignore.

types.name: NameStringValuePair

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of the pair. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: value
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: The value of the pair. Property must be present, but if null the behavior is dependent on usage context.

types.constraints: additionalProperties: false. Required properties: name, value.

properties.name: endpoint
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure endpoint. If omitted or null, http://localhost:4317 is used.

properties.name: tls
properties.description: Configure TLS settings for the exporter. If omitted, system default TLS settings are used.

properties.name: headers
properties.description: Configure headers. Entries have higher priority than entries from .headers_list. If an entry's .value is null, the entry is ignored. If omitted, no headers are added.

properties.name: headers_list
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure headers. Entries have lower priority than entries from .headers. The value is a list of comma separated key-value pairs matching the format of OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS. See https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification/blob/main/specification/protocol/exporter.md#configuration-options for details. If omitted or null, no headers are added.

properties.name: compression
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure compression. Known values include: gzip, none. Implementations may support other compression algorithms. If omitted or null, none is used.

properties.name: timeout
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure max time (in milliseconds) to wait for each export. Value must be non-negative. A value of 0 indicates no limit (infinity). If omitted or null, 10000 is used.

properties.name: endpoint
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure endpoint. If omitted or null, http://localhost:4317 is used.

properties.name: tls
properties.description: Configure TLS settings for the exporter. If omitted, system default TLS settings are used.

properties.name: headers
properties.description: Configure headers. Entries have higher priority than entries from .headers_list. If an entry's .value is null, the entry is ignored. If omitted, no headers are added.

properties.name: headers_list
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure headers. Entries have lower priority than entries from .headers. The value is a list of comma separated key-value pairs matching the format of OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS. See https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification/blob/main/specification/protocol/exporter.md#configuration-options for details. If omitted or null, no headers are added.

properties.name: compression
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure compression. Known values include: gzip, none. Implementations may support other compression algorithms. If omitted or null, none is used.

properties.name: timeout
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure max time (in milliseconds) to wait for each export. Value must be non-negative. A value of 0 indicates no limit (infinity). If omitted or null, 10000 is used.

properties.name: temporality_preference
properties.description: Configure temporality preference. Values include: * cumulative: Use cumulative aggregation temporality for all instrument types. * delta: Use delta aggregation for all instrument types except up down counter and asynchronous up down counter. * low_memory: Use delta aggregation temporality for counter and histogram instrument types. Use cumulative aggregation temporality for all other instrument types. If omitted, cumulative is used.

properties.name: default_histogram_aggregation
properties.description: Configure default histogram aggregation. Values include: * base2_exponential_bucket_histogram: Use base2 exponential histogram as the default aggregation for histogram instruments. * explicit_bucket_histogram: Use explicit bucket histogram as the default aggregation for histogram instruments. If omitted, explicit_bucket_histogram is used.

properties.name: endpoint
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure endpoint, including the signal specific path. If omitted or null, the http://localhost:4318/v1/{signal} (where signal is 'traces', 'logs', or 'metrics') is used.

properties.name: tls
properties.description: Configure TLS settings for the exporter. If omitted, system default TLS settings are used.

properties.name: headers
properties.description: Configure headers. Entries have higher priority than entries from .headers_list. If an entry's .value is null, the entry is ignored. If omitted, no headers are added.

properties.name: headers_list
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure headers. Entries have lower priority than entries from .headers. The value is a list of comma separated key-value pairs matching the format of OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS. See https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification/blob/main/specification/protocol/exporter.md#configuration-options for details. If omitted or null, no headers are added.

properties.name: compression
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure compression. Known values include: gzip, none. Implementations may support other compression algorithms. If omitted or null, none is used.

properties.name: timeout
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure max time (in milliseconds) to wait for each export. Value must be non-negative. A value of 0 indicates no limit (infinity). If omitted or null, 10000 is used.

properties.name: encoding
properties.description: Configure the encoding used for messages. Implementations may not support json. Values include: * json: Protobuf JSON encoding. * protobuf: Protobuf binary encoding. If omitted, protobuf is used.

properties.name: endpoint
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure endpoint. If omitted or null, http://localhost:4318/v1/metrics is used.

properties.name: tls
properties.description: Configure TLS settings for the exporter. If omitted, system default TLS settings are used.

properties.name: headers
properties.description: Configure headers. Entries have higher priority than entries from .headers_list. If an entry's .value is null, the entry is ignored. If omitted, no headers are added.

properties.name: headers_list
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure headers. Entries have lower priority than entries from .headers. The value is a list of comma separated key-value pairs matching the format of OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS. See https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification/blob/main/specification/protocol/exporter.md#configuration-options for details. If omitted or null, no headers are added.

properties.name: compression
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure compression. Known values include: gzip, none. Implementations may support other compression algorithms. If omitted or null, none is used.

properties.name: timeout
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure max time (in milliseconds) to wait for each export. Value must be non-negative. A value of 0 indicates no limit (infinity). If omitted or null, 10000 is used.

properties.name: encoding
properties.description: Configure the encoding used for messages. Implementations may not support json. Values include: * json: Protobuf JSON encoding. * protobuf: Protobuf binary encoding. If omitted, protobuf is used.

properties.name: temporality_preference
properties.description: Configure temporality preference. Values include: * cumulative: Use cumulative aggregation temporality for all instrument types. * delta: Use delta aggregation for all instrument types except up down counter and asynchronous up down counter. * low_memory: Use delta aggregation temporality for counter and histogram instrument types. Use cumulative aggregation temporality for all other instrument types. If omitted, cumulative is used.

properties.name: default_histogram_aggregation
properties.description: Configure default histogram aggregation. Values include: * base2_exponential_bucket_histogram: Use base2 exponential histogram as the default aggregation for histogram instruments. * explicit_bucket_histogram: Use explicit bucket histogram as the default aggregation for histogram instruments. If omitted, explicit_bucket_histogram is used.

properties.name: root
properties.description: Configure root sampler. If omitted, always_on is used.

properties.name: remote_parent_sampled
properties.description: Configure remote_parent_sampled sampler. If omitted, always_on is used.

properties.name: remote_parent_not_sampled
properties.description: Configure remote_parent_not_sampled sampler. If omitted, always_off is used.

properties.name: local_parent_sampled
properties.description: Configure local_parent_sampled sampler. If omitted, always_on is used.

properties.name: local_parent_not_sampled
properties.description: Configure local_parent_not_sampled sampler. If omitted, always_off is used.

properties.name: interval
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure delay interval (in milliseconds) between start of two consecutive exports. Value must be non-negative. If omitted or null, 60000 is used.

properties.name: timeout
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure maximum allowed time (in milliseconds) to export data. Value must be non-negative. A value of 0 indicates no limit (infinity). If omitted or null, 30000 is used.

properties.name: exporter
properties.description: Configure exporter. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: producers
properties.description: Configure metric producers. If omitted, no metric producers are added.

properties.name: cardinality_limits
properties.description: Configure cardinality limits. If omitted, default values as described in CardinalityLimits are used.

properties.name: composite
properties.description: Configure the propagators in the composite text map propagator. Entries from .composite_list are appended to the list here with duplicates filtered out. Built-in propagator keys include: tracecontext, baggage, b3, b3multi. Known third party keys include: xray. If omitted, and .composite_list is omitted or null, a noop propagator is used.

properties.name: composite_list
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure the propagators in the composite text map propagator. Entries are appended to .composite with duplicates filtered out. The value is a comma separated list of propagator identifiers matching the format of OTEL_PROPAGATORS. See https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification/blob/main/specification/configuration/sdk-environment-variables.md#general-sdk-configuration for details. Built-in propagator identifiers include: tracecontext, baggage, b3, b3multi. Known third party identifiers include: xray. If omitted or null, and .composite is omitted or null, a noop propagator is used.

properties.name: prometheus/development
properties.description: Configure exporter to be prometheus. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: exporter
properties.description: Configure exporter. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: producers
properties.description: Configure metric producers. If omitted, no metric producers are added.

properties.name: cardinality_limits
properties.description: Configure cardinality limits. If omitted, default values as described in CardinalityLimits are used.

properties.name: otlp_http
properties.description: Configure exporter to be OTLP with HTTP transport. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: otlp_grpc
properties.description: Configure exporter to be OTLP with gRPC transport. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: otlp_file/development
properties.description: Configure exporter to be OTLP with file transport. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: console
properties.description: Configure exporter to be console. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: attributes
properties.description: Configure resource attributes. Entries have higher priority than entries from .resource.attributes_list. If omitted, no resource attributes are added.

properties.name: detection/development
properties.description: Configure resource detection. If omitted, resource detection is disabled.

properties.name: schema_url
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure resource schema URL. If omitted or null, no schema URL is used.

properties.name: attributes_list
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure resource attributes. Entries have lower priority than entries from .resource.attributes. The value is a list of comma separated key-value pairs matching the format of OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES. See https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification/blob/main/specification/configuration/sdk-environment-variables.md#general-sdk-configuration for details. If omitted or null, no resource attributes are added.

properties.name: always_off
properties.description: Configure sampler to be always_off. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: always_on
properties.description: Configure sampler to be always_on. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: composite/development
properties.description: Configure sampler to be composite. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: jaeger_remote/development
properties.description: Configure sampler to be jaeger_remote. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: parent_based
properties.description: Configure sampler to be parent_based. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: probability/development
properties.description: Configure sampler to be probability. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: trace_id_ratio_based
properties.description: Configure sampler to be trace_id_ratio_based. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: exporter
properties.description: Configure exporter. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: exporter
properties.description: Configure exporter. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: otlp_http
properties.description: Configure exporter to be OTLP with HTTP transport. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: otlp_grpc
properties.description: Configure exporter to be OTLP with gRPC transport. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: otlp_file/development
properties.description: Configure exporter to be OTLP with file transport. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: console
properties.description: Configure exporter to be console. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: attribute_value_length_limit
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure max attribute value size. Overrides .attribute_limits.attribute_value_length_limit. Value must be non-negative. If omitted or null, there is no limit.

properties.name: attribute_count_limit
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure max attribute count. Overrides .attribute_limits.attribute_count_limit. Value must be non-negative. If omitted or null, 128 is used.

properties.name: event_count_limit
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure max span event count. Value must be non-negative. If omitted or null, 128 is used.

properties.name: link_count_limit
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure max span link count. Value must be non-negative. If omitted or null, 128 is used.

properties.name: event_attribute_count_limit
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure max attributes per span event. Value must be non-negative. If omitted or null, 128 is used.

properties.name: link_attribute_count_limit
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure max attributes per span link. Value must be non-negative. If omitted or null, 128 is used.

properties.name: batch
properties.description: Configure a batch span processor. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: simple
properties.description: Configure a simple span processor. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: tracecontext
properties.description: Include the w3c trace context propagator. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: baggage
properties.description: Include the w3c baggage propagator. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: b3
properties.description: Include the zipkin b3 propagator. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: b3multi
properties.description: Include the zipkin b3 multi propagator. If omitted, ignore.

properties.name: ratio
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure trace_id_ratio. If omitted or null, 1.0 is used.

properties.name: processors
properties.description: Configure span processors. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: limits
properties.description: Configure span limits. See also attribute_limits. If omitted, default values as described in SpanLimits are used.

properties.name: sampler
properties.description: Configure the sampler. If omitted, parent based sampler with a root of always_on is used.

properties.name: tracer_configurator/development
properties.description: Configure tracers. If omitted, all tracers use default values as described in ExperimentalTracerConfig.

types.name: View

properties.name: selector
properties.description: Configure view selector. Selection criteria is additive as described in https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification/blob/main/specification/metrics/sdk.md#instrument-selection-criteria. Property is required and must be non-null.

properties.name: stream
properties.description: Configure view stream. Property is required and must be non-null.

types.constraints: additionalProperties: false. Required properties: selector, stream.

properties.name: instrument_name
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure instrument name selection criteria. If omitted or null, all instrument names match.

properties.name: instrument_type
properties.description: Configure instrument type selection criteria. Values include: * counter: Synchronous counter instruments. * gauge: Synchronous gauge instruments. * histogram: Synchronous histogram instruments. * observable_counter: Asynchronous counter instruments. * observable_gauge: Asynchronous gauge instruments. * observable_up_down_counter: Asynchronous up down counter instruments. * up_down_counter: Synchronous up down counter instruments. If omitted, all instrument types match.

properties.name: unit
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure the instrument unit selection criteria. If omitted or null, all instrument units match.

properties.name: meter_name
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure meter name selection criteria. If omitted or null, all meter names match.

properties.name: meter_version
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure meter version selection criteria. If omitted or null, all meter versions match.

properties.name: meter_schema_url
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure meter schema url selection criteria. If omitted or null, all meter schema URLs match.

properties.name: name
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure metric name of the resulting stream(s). If omitted or null, the instrument's original name is used.

properties.name: description
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure metric description of the resulting stream(s). If omitted or null, the instrument's origin description is used.

properties.name: aggregation
properties.description: Configure aggregation of the resulting stream(s). If omitted, default is used.

properties.name: aggregation_cardinality_limit
properties.default: If omitted or null, default behavior applies.
properties.description: Configure the aggregation cardinality limit. If omitted or null, the metric reader's default cardinality limit is used.

properties.name: attribute_keys
properties.description: Configure attribute keys retained in the resulting stream(s). If omitted, all attribute keys are retained.
